$comment: Layer A for SHIPPING vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image. Generated weights include zero and span the PIC 9(5)V99 range, so the reject guard, the cap dispatch, and per-path rounding are exercised by seeded random inputs alone.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 SHIPPING (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-shipping)
